mostInteresting.reason: Jupiter Lend just hit 10,000 users as a major milestone, indicating rapid traction of a direct Solana lending competitor to Kamino. This is strategically significant as Jupiter has strong distribution advantages (integrated with Jupiter DEX) and is actively building lending infrastructure on Kamino's home chain. The 10k user milestone suggests momentum that could capture market share from existing protocols.
